US.name: United States (IBC/NFPA)
US.sprinklerRequired: Depends on occupancy and structure (see NFPA)
US.mechanicalVentilation: Mechanical ventilation typically required for enclosed garages per local code
US.electricalNotes: EV charging infrastructure recommended; electrical distribution per NEC

UK.name: United Kingdom (BS / Approved Document B)
UK.sprinklerRequired: Not always required; dependent on use and size
UK.mechanicalVentilation: Stack effect and mechanical extract guidance in BS standards
UK.electricalNotes: Follow BS 7671 for electrical installations; EV charging guidance applies

CA.name: Canada (NBC)
CA.electricalNotes: Follow Canadian Electrical Code; EV planning advised

AU.name: Australia (AS/NZS)
AU.sprinklerRequired: Depends on building classification and local regs
AU.mechanicalVentilation: AS 1668 and local codes govern ventilation

UAE.name: UAE (Dubai/Bldg Code)
UAE.sprinklerRequired: Often required for enclosed multi-storey garages
UAE.electricalNotes: Local DEWA and authority rules apply

KSA.name: Saudi Arabia (SBC / SASO)
KSA.sprinklerRequired: Depends on building classification and enclosed parking — consult SBC
KSA.mechanicalVentilation: Mechanical ventilation for enclosed garages per local code
KSA.electricalNotes: Follow SASO and local authority wiring regs; EV infrastructure emerging

IN.name: India (NBC/IS)
IN.sprinklerRequired: Usually not mandatory for small open parking; check NBC/state rules for enclosed garages
IN.mechanicalVentilation: Natural or mechanical ventilation guidance per NBC
IN.electricalNotes: Follow IS and local regulations for chargers

SG.name: Singapore (SCDF / BCA)
SG.sprinklerRequired: May be required for enclosed and underground garages per BCA/SCDF
SG.mechanicalVentilation: Strict guidance for enclosed carparks; refer to codes
SG.electricalNotes: Strong EV roll-out policies; plan for charging infrastructure

DE.name: Germany (DIN / VDE)
DE.sprinklerRequired: Determined by building regulations and fire authority
DE.mechanicalVentilation: Requirements for enclosed garages per DIN standards
DE.electricalNotes: Follow VDE and local regulations; EV infrastructure guidance available

FR.name: France (NF / EU regs)
FR.sprinklerRequired: Depends on structure and local fire code
FR.mechanicalVentilation: Refer to French building code and EN standards
FR.electricalNotes: EV deployment guided by local and EU directives

BR.name: Brazil (ABNT)
BR.sprinklerRequired: Depends on building classification and local municipal rules
BR.mechanicalVentilation: Local codes govern enclosed parking ventilation
BR.electricalNotes: Follow ABNT and local utility guidance for chargers

ZA.name: South Africa (SANS)
ZA.sprinklerRequired: Dependent on use and structure; consult SANS/local fire authority
ZA.mechanicalVentilation: Guidance per SANS and local codes
ZA.electricalNotes: EV infrastructure developing; coordinate with local utilities

EG.name: Egypt (EAB / Egyptian Codes)
EG.sprinklerRequired: Often required for enclosed or basement carparks; consult Egyptian fire codes
EG.mechanicalVentilation: Mechanical ventilation for enclosed/basement parking is commonly required
EG.electricalNotes: Follow Egyptian regulations and local utility requirements for EV chargers

TR.name: Turkey (TS / National regs)
TR.sprinklerRequired: Based on building classification and fire code
TR.mechanicalVentilation: Refer to national standards for enclosed garages
TR.electricalNotes: Follow local electrical code and distribution operator guidance

QA.name: Qatar (QCD / Local regs)
QA.sprinklerRequired: Often required for enclosed multi-storey garages
QA.mechanicalVentilation: Typically required for enclosed and basement parking
QA.electricalNotes: Coordinate with Kahramaa and local authority for EV infrastructure

KW.name: Kuwait (Local regs)
KW.mechanicalVentilation: Enclosed parking usually requires mechanical ventilation
KW.electricalNotes: Follow local utility rules for charger installations

ID.name: Indonesia (SNI / Local regs)
ID.sprinklerRequired: Depends on building use and enclosure
ID.mechanicalVentilation: Refer to SNI and local guidance
ID.electricalNotes: Local utility and SNI guidance for electrical installations

MY.name: Malaysia (MS / Local regs)
MY.sprinklerRequired: Determined by building code and fire authority
MY.mechanicalVentilation: Guidance for enclosed carparks in local codes
MY.electricalNotes: Coordinate with TNB and local authorities for EV readiness
